name: Lamb w/ Yoghurt, Coconut Milk & Almond Masala (Badami Gos
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak saffron threads in 1/3 boiling water for at least 10 minutes.
2. Combine saffron and its soaking liquid with yoghurt, caraway seeds, and salt in a deep bowl. Stir well.
3. Add cubed lamb to the mixture and stir until all pieces are evenly coated. Let marinate at room temperature for about 30 minutes.
4. Soak almonds and remaining boiling water in a bowl for 10 minutes. Blend into a smooth paste.
5. Heat ghee in a heavy casserole over moderate heat until hot.
6. Add cinnamon, cardamom, and cloves to the pan; stir for a minute.
7. Add onions, garlic, and ginger. Stir constantly until onions are soft and golden brown (about 7-8 minutes).
8. Remove lamb with a slotted spoon and add to the casserole. Cook until lamb browns evenly.
9. Stir in the marinade, cold water, almond puree, and red pepper. Cook for 10 minutes stirring occasionally.
10. Add coconut milk and bring to a boil. Simmer partially covered for 20 minutes or until lamb is tender.
11. Discard cinnamon and cloves before serving. Mound lamb on a heated platter and pour sauce over it.
